issues.sample: MAKING A RIGHT TURN FROM A STOP ONTO A FREEWAY SIDE STREET. IT IS A 50 MPH ZONE.  ABOUT HALFWAY THROUGH THE TURN ON LIGHT THROTTLE AT ABOUT 10 MPH, I GIVE IT THE GAS AND NOTHING HAPPENS. THE ENGINE IS STILL RUNNING BUT WILL NOT ACCELERATE.  I LET OFF THE THROTTLE COMPLETELY THAN

narrative.headline: What 2017 Mazda Mazda3 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 83 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (24% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
